intro: Dealing with aggressive wasps around your Edison property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast and effective wasp removal services throughout Edison, New Jersey, with pricing from $350 to $550 depending on nest size and location. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from residential and commercial properties across the area.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of experience serving the Edison community with safe, reliable wasp removal services. Our trained professionals use industry-leading techniques and equipment to protect your family, employees, and pets from dangerous wasp stings while completely eliminating the problem at its source.
localContext: Edison's mix of suburban homes, the sprawling Menlo Park Mall area, and commercial properties along Route 1 all attract wasps seeking shelter in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. From the historic neighborhoods near Roosevelt Park to newer developments near Oak Tree Road, our team knows the specific wasp species common to Middlesex County and how to handle them effectively.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Edison typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests or easily accessible eaves are usually at the lower end, while high roof peaks or concealed wall nests may cost more due to the additional equipment and time required.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Edison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day wasp removal service throughout Edison in most cases. Once on-site, most wasp nest removals take 30-60 minutes, including treatment and nest removal. We understand wasp problems require urgent attention, especially during peak summer months when nests are most active.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods specifically designed for residential and commercial properties. Our technicians take precautions to protect your family, pets, and landscaping. We typically recommend keeping people and pets inside during treatment and for 1-2 hours afterward as a safety measure.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Edison commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests or wall voids, while paper wasps create umbrella-shaped nests under eaves. Our technicians are experienced with all local wasp species and adjust removal methods accordingly for safe, complete elimination.
